problems_encountered.description: API returned 403 Forbidden when attempting to get domain with ID 'test-domain-id'. This indicates either the domain doesn't exist or the user lacks permission to access it.

tool_response_summary: Tool execution failed with 403 status code. Cannot test this tool without a valid domain ID. No domains exist in the available projects.
execution_notes: Tool requires a valid domain ID to function. Since no domains exist in the test projects, cannot complete a successful eval. Tool implementation appears functional but requires pre-existing domain resources.
